Petition For Order Instructing Executor Concerning Testamentary Gift To Maria Luisa Novoa Urbina
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Perdue appeared in person for Napoleon Urbina (petitioner).

The Court take this matter under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Rice (specially appearing for Jesus Hernandez, Counsel for Napoleon Urbina, Personal Representative).

Mr. Rice specially appeared in Mr. Hernandez's absence to advise the Court that the accounting was still being prepared and request a continuance of the matter. The Court continued the matter to January 31, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
